revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: IMPORTING ALL WANTED MODULES

revision.text:
{{Module rating|protected}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Webarchive/data|Module:Arguments}} This module implements {{ti|webarchive}}.
This module uses [[Module:Webarchive/data{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|/sandbox}}]] to support configuration control and internationalization.
== Tracking categories == ===Tracking archive sites=== * {{clc|Webarchive template wayback links}} – links to Wayback Machine * {{clc|Webarchive template webcite links}} – links to WebCite * {{clc|Webarchive template other archives}} – all the other archive sites that don't have their own tracking category * {{clc|Webarchive template unknown archives}} – the template doesn't recognize the archive URL; this may indicate an error in the data; or the template itself needs updating to reflect a new archive site ===Tracking warnings and errors === * {{clc|Webarchive template warnings}} – soft errors that don't prevent the template from working but leave a red message * {{clc|Webarchive template errors}} – errors typically requiring human intervention * {{clc|Webarchive template archiveis links}} – links to Archive.Today, which is [[WP:ATODAY|deprecated]] as an archive. Uses should be migrated to another archive.
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| [[Category:Modules that add a tracking category]] }}</includeonly>

{{Module rating|protected}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Webarchive/data|Module:Arguments}} This module implements {{ti|webarchive}}.
This module uses [[Module:Webarchive/data{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|/sandbox}}]] to support configuration control and internationalization.
== Tracking categories == ===Tracking archive sites=== * {{clc|Webarchive template wayback links}} – links to Wayback Machine * {{clc|Webarchive template webcite links}} – links to WebCite * {{clc|Webarchive template other archives}} – all the other archive sites that don't have their own tracking category * {{clc|Webarchive template unknown archives}} – the template doesn't recognize the archive URL; this may indicate an error in the data; or the template itself needs updating to reflect a new archive site ===Tracking warnings and errors === * {{clc|Webarchive template warnings}} – soft errors that don't prevent the template from working but leave a red message * {{clc|Webarchive template errors}} – errors typically requiring human intervention * {{clc|Webarchive template archiveis links}} – links to Archive.Today, which is [[WP:ATODAY|deprecated]] as an archive. Uses should be migrated to another archive.
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| [[Category:Modules that add a tracking category]] }}</includeonly>

Uses should be migrated to another archive.

Uses should be migrated to another archive.
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| [[Category:Modules that add a tracking category]] }}</includeonly>
